sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Skating
special_mechanics.description: Primary movement mechanic in ice hockey game. Players control skaters moving across ice rink with momentum-based skating physics

special_mechanics.name: Fighting System
special_mechanics.description: Two players engage in combat after three consecutive bumps without hitting another player. Pre-fight confrontation allows punch exchanges. Full fight mode with high/low punch and block mechanics. Health bar of 5 hits determines loser who receives penalty.

special_mechanics.name: Power Play
special_mechanics.description: Penalized player removed to penalty box creating numerical advantage. Up to 4 players can be penalized simultaneously for maximum 5-on-1 advantage.

special_mechanics.name: Penalty Shot
special_mechanics.description: Awarded when fight occurs in front of net. Shooting player stands on blue line (not advancing toward goaltender), administered in soccer penalty style.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources contain game design and mechanic descriptions but no quantified physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, sub-pixel precision). Game is sports-themed ice hockey with emphasis on skating and fighting mechanics rather than traditional platformer physics. Specific movement values not documented in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Blades of Steel (NES, Famicom Disk System)
